description: .lumindad_cache — Offline TTL cache for LumindAd notebooks

entry_schema.hash: str — MD5 hex digest of key (= filename without .pkl)
entry_schema.created_at: ISO8601 UTC — when entry was created

invalidation: Entry is expired when datetime.utcnow() > expires_at
fallback: On miss or expiry, OfflineCache uses embedded FALLBACK constants
author: Elizabeth Díaz Familia · Sustainable AI Scientist
